name: rmk-radar
description: Радар технологий — интерактивная визуализация цифровой зрелости

scripts.format:check:frontend: prettier --check package.json package-lock.json eslint.config.cjs .prettierrc.json .pre-commit-config.yaml .github/workflows/quality.yml docs/RELEASE_PROCESS.md docs/TEAM_RESPONSIBILITIES.md docs/ROLE_MODEL_V2.md docs/ROLE_MIGRATION_PLAN.md docs/MODERATION_WORKFLOW.md docs/LOCAL_PRODLIKE_QUICKSTART.md docs/FRONTEND_STORAGE_POLICY.md docs/BACKUP_RESTORE_RUNBOOK.md docs/LOAD_SMOKE_RUNBOOK.md docs/NEXT_DEVELOPMENT_PLAN.md
scripts.quality:frontend: npm run lint:frontend && npm run format:check:frontend
scripts.test:backend: python backend/manage.py test auth_custom references technologies admin_panel config --noinput
scripts.test:local: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
